Tikha Chivda

તીખા ચીવડા

"Bold. Spicy. Dangerously good."

Tikha Chivda is for those who like their snacks with serious heat. Made from thick poha coated in a fiery masala blend, it carries a deep orange-red colour and a punch of flavour that builds with every bite. If you love spicy, this is your snack.

Spice Level

🔴🔴🔴🔴 Spicy

Shelf Life

15 days

Available In

250g · 500g

Best With

Cooling chaas

Order on WhatsApp ← Full Menu

How It's Made

કેવી રીતે બને છે

Every batch at SSKFG is made by hand, the same way it has been since 1951. No shortcuts. No machines doing what hands can do better.

1

Thick poha is fried until crisp and then immediately tossed in a hot oil-based masala mixture of red chilli powder, coriander, cumin, black salt and dried mango powder.

2

The hot coating soaks into the poha while it cools, locking in the spice.

Ingredients

સામગ્રી

Thick Flattened Rice (Poha)Vegetable OilRed Chilli PowderCoriander PowderCuminBlack SaltDried Mango PowderTurmericSalt

✓ No major allergens
